Dear police officer,

"Your friends dont care about you. They care about the unarmed people."

"They just want you to die for nothing."

"Think of your wife and kids crying in front of TV"

"What will your kids think of you when they grow up?"

"Daddy, why are you shooting old men and young schoolchildren?"

"are you doing what is good for HK?"

"who are you serving, really?"

"how will you explain to children what you are doing?"

"how would you feel if someone shot you?"

"Are you selling out your friends and neighbors?"

"Who are you really serving?"

"Who are you really protecting?"

"besides money and buddies, how happy are you with your life?"

"What will you tell yourself on your deathbed?"

Please help to translate!!

光復香港！時代革命！
Liberate Hong Kong!
The Revolution Of Our Times!



五大訴求
1. 徹底撤回逃犯修訂條例
2. 釋放所有因反送中被捕人士並承諾永不追究
3. 撤回612暴動定性
4. 追究警察濫權濫暴(包括721元朗官警黑勾結事件)，成立獨立調查委員會
5. 立即實行雙普選


Hongkongers 5 Demands:
1. Full Withdrawal of the Extradition Bill
2. Retraction of the Characterisation of the Protestas a Riot
3. Release all Arrested Protesters
4. Accountability for Police and Yuen Long White Shirts Brutality
5. Implement Dual Universal Suffrage

推俾樓主
只要香港主要交通幹道用唔到，就會配合罷工罷市罷課

1. 香城紅磡海底隧道
集合點1:理工大學門口
集合點2:維多利亞公園銅鑼灣入口噴水池

2. 香城東區海底隧道/東區走廊
集合點：鰂魚涌公園

3. 香城獅子山隧道
集合點：浸會大學善衡校園

4. 香城大老山隧道
集合點：牛池灣公園

預計凌晨開始集合，清晨六點開始行動
唔該billy巴
